publishedAbstract: - Unable to update resources on OpenShift Data Foundation components- Rook is unable to reconcile due to an invalid value- OpenShift Data Foundations upgrade isn't progressing as Rook is unable to reconcile the deployments Example: Events show failed reconciliation of OpenShift Data Foundation cluster resources ~~~ $ oc get events-n openshift-storage 25s Warning ReconcileFailed cephcluster/ocs-storagecluster-cephcluster failed to reconcile CephCluster "openshift-storage/ocs-storagecluster-cephcluster". failed to reconcile cluster "ocs-storagecluster-cephcluster": failed to configure local ceph cluster: failed to create cluster: failed to start ceph osds: 3 failures encountered while running osds on nodes in namespace "openshift-storage".... 5m27s Warning ReconcileFailed cephfilesystem/ocs-storagecluster-cephfilesystem failed to reconcile CephFilesystem "openshift-storage/ocs-storagecluster-cephfilesystem". failed to create filesystem "ocs-storagecluster-cephfilesystem": failed to start deployment for MDS "a" for filesystem "ocs-storagecluster-cephfilesystem": failed to create mds deployment rook-ceph-mds-ocs-storagecluster-cephfilesystem-a: Deployment.apps "rook-ceph-mds-ocs-storagecluster-cephfilesystem-a" is invalid: [spec.template.spec.containers[0].resources.limits[Cpu]: Invalid value: Cpu: must be a standard resource type or fully qualified, spec.template.spec.containers[0].resources.limits[Cpu]: Invalid value: Cpu: must be a standard resource for containers, spec.template.spec.containers[0].resources.limits[MEMORY]: Invalid value: MEMORY: must be a standard resource type or fully qualified, spec.template.spec.containers[0].resources.limits[MEMORY]: Invalid value: MEMORY: must be a standard resource for containers, spec.template.spec.containers[0].resources.requests[CPU]: Invalid value: CPU: must be a standard resource type or fully qualified, spec.template.spec.containers[0].resources.requests[CPU]: Invalid value: CPU: must be a standard resource for containers, spec.template.spec.initContainers[0].resources.limits[MEMORY]: Invalid value: MEMORY: must be a standard resource type or fully qualified, spec.template.spec.initContainers[0].resources.limits[MEMORY]: Invalid value: MEMORY: must be a standard resource for containers, spec.template.spec.initContainers[0].resources.limits[Cpu]: Invalid value: Cpu: must be a standard resource type or fully qualified, spec.template.spec.initContainers[0].resources.limits[Cpu]: Invalid value: Cpu: must be a standard resource for containers, spec.template.spec.initContainers[0].resources.requests[CPU]: Invalid value: CPU: must be a standard resource type or fully qualified, spec.template.spec.initContainers[0].resources.requests[CPU]: Invalid value: CPU: must be a standard resource for containers] 8m8s Warning ReconcileFailed cephfilesystem/ocs-storagecluster-cephfilesystem failed to reconcile CephFilesystem "openshift-storage/ocs-storagecluster-cephfilesystem". failed to detect running and desired ceph version: failed to detect ceph image version: failed to complete ceph version job: failed to run CmdReporter ceph-file-controller-detect-version successfully. failed waiting for results ConfigMap ceph-file-controller-detect-version. timed out waiting for results ConfigMap ~~~
publishedTitle: ODF: Rook Unable to Reconcile Components Due to Invalid Value
